notes: The response is structured as a discovery plan/consulting engagement proposal rather than a discovery artefact — it is solution-framed throughout (deliverables, workflow stages, integration plans), has no named personas with cost/timing, produces no bounded MVP with explicit deferrals, has no out-of-scope section at all, and while it surfaces genuine risks/uncertainties (FMA bias finding, CCCFA sign-off) these are embedded in a question list rather than structured assumptions; D1=0.0 categorical fail applies as the problem statement IS replaced by solution deliverables, setting compliant=false.
